title: BloonsTDM
description: Bloons Tower Defence but in Minecraft
body:
## Basic Info
This is a mod created to play BTD6 in Minecraft. The purpose of this mod is to let people that like both games play the 2 games together. Balloons will spawn naturally in all biomes, and you can fight them using weapons from BTD6.
## Added Objects
### Items:
Dart (and the upgrade), Tack and the things to use it, Bomb, and Sentry.
### Entities:
Monkey (many types), Bloons (red, blue, green), Moab (boss).
### Dimension:
Banana world

## Patreons 会员
Nobody yet 没有人（蹦）
